stemHtml: Two of the requirements for the issuance of an ATPL(A) licence are...

options.a: 100 hours of flight time in a simulator with a maximum of 30 hours in an FNPT.
options.b: 75 hours of flight time in a simulator with a maximum of 30 hours in an FNPT.
options.c: 100 hours of flight time in a simulator with a maximum of 25 hours in an FNPT.
options.d: 250 hours of flight time in a simulator with a maximum of 70 hours in an FNPT.
